nodes.evidence: [P-1] P: Yeah, I woke up this morning and I was just feeling suddenly feeling very short of breath and I just wasn't sure what was going on, so I thought I would come in.
[D-2] D: OK, this this morning suddenly feeling short of breath. OK, and this cough was not also something that happens suddenly this morning?
[P-4] P: Um it's a dry cough.
[D-5] D: OK. OK, have you had any fevers?
[P-5] P: Um yeah, I checked it this morning. I was like it was kind of mild, so 37.4 I think.
[D-7] D: OK. OK, uh. Have you had any chest pain? [P-7] P: No.
[P-8] P: No, no. Although I I should let you know and maybe I don't know if it's related um, but I had a seizure last night.
[D-13] D: Have you had any nausea or vomiting? [P-13] P: No.
[D-13] D: Have you had any nausea or vomiting? [P-13] P: No.
[D-14] D: Any belly pain [P-14] P: Uh no.
[D-15] D: OK, any diarrhea? [P-15] P: Uh no, no I don't.
[D-20] D: Have you had any sore throat? [P-20] P: No.
[D-21] D: Runny nose? [P-21] P: No.
[P-8] P: ...I do have a seizure disorder I have epilepsy.
[P-23] P: Um I'm taking Keppra.
[P-26] P: Yeah, epilepsy runs in the family. My mom had it.
[D-34] D: Do you smoke? [P-35] P: I don’t, no.
[D-36] D: And did you use any other substances? [P-36] P: No, I don't.
[D-17] D: Have you traveled anywhere? [P-17] P: No, I've just been at home.
